name: list_robots
description: List all available Maxun web scraping robots. Use this when the user wants to see what robots they have, 'list my robots', 'show robots', or 'what robots do I have'. This is the first step before running a specific robot to get its ID.

name: run_robot
description: Run a specific Maxun robot to scrape a website. Use this when the user wants to execute or run a robot. You must first use list_robots to get the robotId. For getting robot details, use get_robot instead.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot to run (get this from list_robots output)

name: list_runs
description: List all past runs of a specific Maxun robot. Use this to see the execution history of a robot, including run IDs and timestamps. For getting the actual results of a run, use get_run_result instead.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot to list runs for (get this from list_robots output)

name: get_run_result
description: Get the results of a specific Maxun robot run. Use this to retrieve the scraped data from a completed or in-progress run. You need both robot_id and run_id (get these from list_robots and list_runs respectively).

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot (get this from list_robots output)

run_id.description: The ID of the run to get results for (get this from list_runs output)

name: get_robot
description: Get detailed information about a specific Maxun robot. Use this to view robot configuration, including URL, selectors, and settings. For running the robot, use run_robot instead.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot to get details for (get this from list_robots output)

name: abort_run
description: Abort a running Maxun robot scrape job. Use this when the user wants to stop a running robot. You need both robot_id and run_id (get these from list_robots and list_runs respectively).

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot (get this from list_robots output)

run_id.description: The ID of the running run to abort (get this from list_runs output)
